builds.name: Poppy Field Poison
builds.notes: Potentially the best single build in the entire game. Poison ignores Shield and stacks freely.

builds.name: Peacewrought
builds.notes: Strong from early with economy support. Library play — buy/transform reagents to grow Philosopher's Stone.

builds.name: Self Poison
builds.notes: Controlled self-poison fuels Lifesteal and all Poison-on-self triggers.

builds.name: Magic Carpet Crit
builds.notes: RNG-dependent but high ceiling with stacked crit chance.

builds.name: Jabalian Drum
builds.notes: Slow start but compounds into near-unkillable late game. Economy is everything.

builds.name: Fixer Upper
builds.notes: Repair/upgrade mechanics create Fantastic late-game scaling.

builds.name: Freeze Build
builds.notes: Freeze locks out opponent's key items while you scale freely.

builds.name: Fit Pyg
builds.notes: Physical scaling via Pyg's Gym stacks. Good consistent damage.

builds.name: Charging Items
builds.notes: Strong early with charged items, falls off late.

builds.name: Dooltron (Friends)
builds.notes: Best early game of any Dooley build. Dooltron + Companion Core is extremely fast. Falls off vs. hard scaling.

builds.name: Bug Squad
builds.notes: 5 bugs + Robotic Factory Multicast = absurd activation count. Fun and surprisingly effective.

builds.name: Weaponized Core
builds.notes: Permanently stacks weapon damage. High ceiling, inconsistent.

builds.name: Ignition Core
builds.notes: Good early Burn, weak late game as shield scaling reduces Burn effectiveness.

builds.name: Flagship
builds.notes: SEASON 14 BUFF: CD standardized to 5s at all tiers. Potentially reviving into A-tier after being dormant.

builds.name: Aquatic / Poison
builds.notes: Poison bypasses Shield. Tortuga's board-wide Haste makes the cycle spin fast.

builds.name: Saloon Friends
builds.notes: Unique archetype — great late game when fully built.

builds.name: Tortuga Haste
builds.notes: Tortuga's board-wide 1s Haste makes fast-CD weapons cycle constantly.

builds.name: Mono-Weapon Sniper
builds.notes: All-in on one hyperscaled weapon. Can hit extremely hard but ammo-dependent.

builds.name: Multi-Weapon
builds.notes: Strong early pressure, doesn't scale as well as poison builds.

builds.name: Skyliner Stack
builds.notes: Most consistent Stelle build. Recommended for beginners. Skyliner Multicast scales with flying item count.

builds.name: LavaRoller Burn
builds.notes: Highest Burn ceiling in the game. LavaRoller self-doubles — late fights become impossible to survive.

builds.name: Haste-Fly Hybrid
builds.notes: Generates free Shield via Pill Buggy from haste triggers. Surprisingly tanky.

builds.name: Fly Cycling
builds.notes: Start/stop cycling creates rapid trigger chains.

builds.name: Durian Shield Conversion
builds.notes: Stack Shield → Durian converts all of it to damage. Can be set up from Level 3. Very strong.

builds.name: Burn (Anyone Can Cook)
builds.notes: Microwave hastens Grill for fast Burn cycling. Board-wide food haste enables rapid stacking.

builds.name: Farmer's Market Regen
builds.notes: Regen → Damage conversion via Bread Knife. Also stacks Max Health.

builds.name: Feast Build
builds.notes: 10-0 recorded runs. Feast does everything — damage and healing.

builds.name: Jacket Exodia
builds.notes: Near-invulnerability during Enrage. Considered the strongest Karnok build.

builds.name: Runic Claymore
builds.notes: SEASON 14 BUFF: 15% Max Health damage. Most flexible and consistent Karnok build.

builds.name: Ammo Build
builds.notes: Chains Slows + Hunting Rifle burst. Strong early tempo.

builds.name: Giant Sling Rage Burst
builds.notes: Burst all Enrage window damage into Giant Sling activations.

builds.name: Max HP Burst
builds.notes: Stack Max Health for Runic Claymore. One-shot potential while using HP as a tank.

buffs.change: CD standardized to 5s at all tiers (was 7/6/5). Damage significantly increased.
Damage increased from 10% to 15% of own Max Health.
Now always Charges 2s; improved Gold-tier performance.
Now grants base +10 Damage and +10 Shield to all items regardless of flight.

nerfs.change: Elevated to Gold tier. Shield scaling capped at 25% (was uncapped).
